name: orchestra
description: Marketplace for the Orchestra plugins — the orchestra multi-agent orchestration plugin and its optional orchestra-memory graph-memory companion.

plugins.name: orchestra
plugins.description: Multi-agent orchestration plugin for Claude Code — inspired by oh-my-openagent's 3-layer architecture (planning, orchestration, execution) with specialized agents, wisdom accumulation, file claiming, and quality gates. Works fully standalone. Graph memory is provided by the separate optional companion plugin orchestra-memory; when it is not installed, orchestra falls back to the legacy .claude/orchestra-wisdom.json file for wisdom accumulation.

plugins.name: orchestra-memory
plugins.description: Standalone cross-project graph-memory MCP server for Claude Code — SQLite-backed (node:sqlite) with FTS5 full-text search, temporal validity, and global/project/private scoping. Injects token-dense memory context at session start and after compaction. Works standalone or as the optional companion to the orchestra orchestration plugin.
